pred_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Trial phase", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Hodgkin Lymphoma' AND "Name of ICI" = 'Brentuximab-vedotin' AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 3'
